body.title: Golden test vector — minimal first version

_test_keypair_note: This example uses the public-domain test keypair from schemas/conformance/sig-001-ed25519-golden.json. Private seed is 32 zero bytes; public key is 3b6a27bcceb6a42d62a3a8d02a6f0d73653215771de243a63ac048a18b59da29 (hex). DO NOT use this keypair for real publications. The signature here is REAL Ed25519 over the bytes of the content_hash string and verifies against the test public key.
